query:
SELECT id, variantName, productId, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created 
FROM product_variants 
WHERE productId = 60011 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT id, variantName, productId, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created 
FROM product_variants 
WHERE productId = 60011 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
